free_text: Reactions in the 9-Be+9-Be system at low energies
- By Author - The absolute normalization of the
reaction cross section was obtained from a  comparison
with the simultaneously observed elastic scattering, fo
which cross sections were known from REL-REF.
Parameters of Optical Model For Be-9+Be-9 System.
Statistical Model and DWBA Analysis.
No information about source of uncertainty
By F.C.

Be-8 ejectiles were registered as two decay alpha
particles measured in coincidence in a pair of
semiconductor counters.
The thickness of the self-supporting 9Be targets used
in these measurements was between 40 and 60 ug/cm2.
Special precautions were undertaken to diminish the
carbon deposit on the target built up during the
measurements.
Thin 15 um semiconductor Delta-E
counter followed by a thick semiconductor E-counter.
